raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I requested a balance transfer to be deposited directly into my Bank of XXXX checking account for {$1500.00}. Barclays XXXX XXXX billed my account for {$1500.00} plus balance fees on XX/XX/year>. The funds were never transferred into my account and I never received the {$1500.00}. 

I have spoken to about 5 supervisors concerning this fraud. Each supervisor has given me different information on resolving this matter continuously moving the date back on when the problem will be resolved. 

My case number for this issue is XXXX. 

I am respectfully request help from your agency to resolve this dispute.
